subcodes.first_line: May this evanescent and lowly one be a sacrifice unto that Friend of Faran. Praise be to the Beloved of the worlds, for the fire of divine attraction hath been kindled in the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فدای آن خلیل فارانی این ذلیل فانی حمد محبوب عالمیان را که نار جذب الهی در قلب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
